text: Aside from week 4 , I found this course to be little more than a commercial for various social analytics programs . Also , there ' s a Google + assignment . Google + wasn ' t relevant five years ago , let alone in 2016 . There ' s some potential in this course but it desperately needs to be updated for 2017 . This course may be helpful to people just starting out as social media professionals but if you ' re already working in this field , you will find this course incredibly dull .
